heading: Director of the Government Publishing Office: employment of skilled workmen; trial of skill
label: 306 Director of the Government Publishing Office: employment of skilled workmen; trial of skill
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office shall employ workmen who are thoroughly skilled in their respective branches of industry, as shown by trial of their skill under the direction of the Director.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 41 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 4528 Stat. 607

Amendments2014—, substituted “the direction of the Director” for “his direction”.Pub. L. 113–235, § 1301(i)(3), substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 113–235, § 1301(c)
